member.summary: Specifies a C `const` for a parameter or return value.

member.summary: Specifies a C node with a specific kind for a C# type.

member.name: T:bottlenoselabs.C2CS.Runtime.CString
member.summary: A pointer value type of bytes that represent a string; the C type `char*`.

member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether this is a null pointer.

member.summary: Performs an explicit conversion from a to a .

member.name: M:bottlenoselabs.C2CS.Runtime.CString.ToString(bottlenoselabs.C2CS.Runtime.CString)
member.summary: Converts a C style string (ANSI or UTF-8) of type `char` (one dimensional byte array terminated by a 0x0) to a UTF-16 by allocating and copying.
member.param: A pointer to the C string.

member.name: M:bottlenoselabs.C2CS.Runtime.CString.op_Explicit(System.String)~bottlenoselabs.C2CS.Runtime.CString
member.summary: Performs an explicit conversion from a to a .

member.name: M:bottlenoselabs.C2CS.Runtime.CString.FromString(System.String)
member.summary: Converts a UTF-16 to a C style string (one dimensional byte array terminated by a 0x0) by allocating and copying.

member.name: M:bottlenoselabs.C2CS.Runtime.CString.op_Equality(bottlenoselabs.C2CS.Runtime.CString,bottlenoselabs.C2CS.Runtime.CString)
member.summary: Returns a value that indicates whether two specified structures are equal.
member.returns: true if and are equal; otherwise, false.

member.summary: Returns a value that indicates whether two specified structures are not equal.
member.returns: true if and are not equal; otherwise, false.

member.name: T:bottlenoselabs.C2CS.Runtime.CStrings
member.summary: Utility methods for interoperability with C style strings in C#.

member.name: M:bottlenoselabs.C2CS.Runtime.CStrings.CStringArray(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.String})
member.summary: Converts an array of strings to an array of C strings of type `char` (multi-dimensional array of one dimensional byte arrays each terminated by a 0x0) by allocating and copying if not already cached.
member.returns: An array pointer of C string pointers. You are responsible for freeing the returned pointer.

member.name: M:bottlenoselabs.C2CS.Runtime.CStrings.CStringWideArray(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.String})
member.summary: Converts an array of strings to an array of C strings of type `wchar_t` (multi-dimensional array of one dimensional ushort arrays each terminated by a 0x0) by allocating and copying if not already cached.
member.returns: An array pointer of C string pointers. You are responsible for freeing the returned pointer.

member.name: T:bottlenoselabs.C2CS.Runtime.CStringWide
member.summary: A pointer value type that represents a wide string; C type `wchar_t*`.

member.name: P:bottlenoselabs.C2CS.Runtime.CStringWide.IsNull
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether this is a null pointer.

member.name: M:bottlenoselabs.C2CS.Runtime.CStringWide.#ctor(System.Byte*)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the struct.

member.name: M:bottlenoselabs.C2CS.Runtime.CStringWide.#ctor(System.IntPtr)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the struct.

member.name: M:bottlenoselabs.C2CS.Runtime.CStringWide.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the struct.

member.name: M:bottlenoselabs.C2CS.Runtime.CStringWide.op_Explicit(System.IntPtr)~bottlenoselabs.C2CS.Runtime.CStringWide
member.summary: Performs an explicit conversion from a to a .

member.name: M:bottlenoselabs.C2CS.Runtime.CStringWide.FromIntPtr(System.IntPtr)
member.summary: Performs an explicit conversion from a to a .

member.name: M:bottlenoselabs.C2CS.Runtime.CStringWide.op_Implicit(System.Byte*)~bottlenoselabs.C2CS.Runtime.CStringWide
member.summary: Performs an implicit conversion from a byte pointer to a .

member.name: M:bottlenoselabs.C2CS.Runtime.CStringWide.From(System.Byte*)
member.summary: Performs an implicit conversion from a byte pointer to a .

member.name: M:bottlenoselabs.C2CS.Runtime.CStringWide.op_Implicit(bottlenoselabs.C2CS.Runtime.CStringWide)~System.IntPtr
member.summary: Performs an implicit conversion from a to a .

member.name: M:bottlenoselabs.C2CS.Runtime.CStringWide.ToIntPtr(bottlenoselabs.C2CS.Runtime.CStringWide)
member.summary: Performs an implicit conversion from a to a .

member.name: M:bottlenoselabs.C2CS.Runtime.CStringWide.op_Explicit(bottlenoselabs.C2CS.Runtime.CStringWide)~System.String
member.summary: Performs an explicit conversion from a to a .

member.name: M:bottlenoselabs.C2CS.Runtime.CStringWide.ToString(bottlenoselabs.C2CS.Runtime.CStringWide)
member.summary: Converts a C style string (unicode) of type `wchar_t` (one dimensional ushort array terminated by a 0x0) to a UTF-16 by allocating and copying.
member.param: A pointer to the C string.

member.name: M:bottlenoselabs.C2CS.Runtime.CStringWide.op_Explicit(System.String)~bottlenoselabs.C2CS.Runtime.CStringWide
member.summary: Performs an explicit conversion from a to a .

member.name: M:bottlenoselabs.C2CS.Runtime.CStringWide.FromString(System.String)
member.summary: Converts a C string pointer (one dimensional byte array terminated by a 0x0) for a specified by allocating and copying if not already cached.

member.name: M:bottlenoselabs.C2CS.Runtime.CStringWide.op_Equality(bottlenoselabs.C2CS.Runtime.CStringWide,bottlenoselabs.C2CS.Runtime.CStringWide)
member.summary: Returns a value that indicates whether two specified structures are equal.
member.returns: true if and are equal; otherwise, false.

member.name: M:bottlenoselabs.C2CS.Runtime.CStringWide.op_Inequality(bottlenoselabs.C2CS.Runtime.CStringWide,bottlenoselabs.C2CS.Runtime.CStringWide)
member.summary: Returns a value that indicates whether two specified structures are not equal.
member.returns: true if and are not equal; otherwise, false.

member.name: M:bottlenoselabs.C2CS.Runtime.CStringWide.Equals(bottlenoselabs.C2CS.Runtime.CStringWide,bottlenoselabs.C2CS.Runtime.CStringWide)
member.summary: Returns a value that indicates whether two specified structures are equal.
member.returns: true if and are equal; otherwise, false.
